docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, EDUARDO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-03-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF MOHAMMAD BEDWI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EDUARDO GONZALEZ IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS REVIEWED AND RETURNED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BEDWI, MOHAMMAD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, EDUARDO $1,978.86 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,123.86 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,978.86 FILED BY BEDWI, MOHAMMAD AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, EDUARDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-03-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BEDWI, MOHAMMAD AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, EDUARDO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $80.00) SERVED DEC-14-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, EDUARDO
